name: ADRD Researcher Community
description: Comprehensive database and collaboration platform for Alzheimer's disease research scientists across the ADRC network.

name: Researcher Profile App
description: Web application for ADRD researchers to manage profiles, data permissions, and discover collaborators by expertise.

name: NACC Website
description: New NACC website built on a WordPress block theme, integrated with NACC's data and community platforms.

name: ADRD Research Hub
description: Platform for neuroscience researchers to find funding opportunities, jobs, and stay current on ADRD and AI research trends.

name: Travel Companion App
description: Trip organizer with itinerary management, fellow traveler insights, and travel loyalty points optimization.

name: Package & Delivery Tracker
description: Unified dashboard to track purchases from multiple vendors and coordinate deliveries across locations.

name: Family Law Directory
description: Directory of family law attorneys with a focus on collaborative law practitioners.

name: AI Learning Platform
description: Learning resource to help others build practical AI agent and automation skills.

name: AI Personal Assistant
description: Custom personal and professional AI assistant built for productivity, research, and daily workflows.

name: Personal Knowledge System
description: A system for capturing, organizing, and surfacing knowledge across research, projects, and interests.

name: Self-Hosted VPS Lab
description: Personal VPS on Hostinger using Docker and Tailscale — running n8n, Karakeep, personal sites, and open source exploration.

name: amyyoung.me
description: Personal blog covering AI, data, product, research, Alzheimer's research, travel, and sports.
